title: dateTimePeriod
description:
Date-Time

NOTE: Using start and end parameters within dateTimeRange will fetch the data on particular days in between the timestamps given.

.

start.description: The date for (or from which) the data is required. Supports in YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ format.

end.description: The date to which data is required. Supports in YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ format.
